title: tabernaemontana sumatrana
intro: Tabernaemontana sumatrana, also known as Sumatran yellow milk, is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Tabernaemontana sumatrana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various respiratory issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant are usually made into teas, infusions, or ointments, which can be used to treat various ailments, showcasing its versatility in natural remedies.
